ab: Malacafay kako ato wina a misalama anini.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: Salangdaw sanay ko kakarayan to romi’ad, cowa kasienaw cowa kafaedet ko romi’ad, saemelay ko fali.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: I rengorengosan kami a komaen to epang, tada diheko a mapacidal ko tireng.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: Herek no lahok, kahengang to ko kakarayan.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: Licayaen ako ko wina, mana kahengang sa ko kakarayan?
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: Sowal sa ko wina, o aira ko faliyos tayni alatek.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: To dadaya, awaay ko o’ol i kakarayan, mahadakay to ko fo’is.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: Toya pinokayan a lalan, pasifo’is kako a mitolon.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: Nanay ca to katayni ko faliyos, hay nga’ay mahadak ho kako a misalama.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，因為我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
